LanguageData.VFEC_NAR_EnableAutoResearchTip: When on, the Eastern Republic senators' Profectus perk automatically unlocks random research projects.
LanguageData.VFEC_NAR_ShowToggleTip: Shows a toggle in the bottom-right play-settings row once the Profectus perk is unlocked, letting you flip auto research on and off without opening this menu.
LanguageData.VFEC_NAR_ToggleTip: Profectus auto research\n\nClick to toggle whether the Eastern Republic senators' Profectus perk automatically unlocks random research.
